evaluation_method: Run advanced commit-readiness scenarios through the output eval runner and grade coverage-led behavior, review-scope honesty, advisory fallback boundaries, and grading-compatibility phrases without requiring the final output to dump internal reducer internals verbatim.

cases.prompt: Review this large staged snapshot update before commit.
cases.fixture: A large diff dominated by generated snapshots with truncation.

cases.prompt: Review all staged changes before commit, even if the diff is large.
cases.fixture: A large staged diff where the helper emits Review Manifest, Review Plan JSON, a split-required generated group, a high-risk migration group, and reducer state. One reviewed migration drops a column without compatibility handling.

cases.prompt: Review these generated snapshot changes before commit and call out any source-consistency risks.
cases.fixture: A generated-heavy diff where the source file is present but the generated snapshots dominate the patch.

cases.prompt: Do a quick triage of current changes before commit even if you cannot access the repository.
cases.fixture: The helper reports that the current directory is not a git repository.
Staged changes and unstaged edits touch the same file.

must_include: unstaged changes touch files also staged

cases.prompt: Review this staged authorization diff before commit. A prior reviewer suspected an auth bypass at the controller, so trace to the execution point before reporting it.
cases.fixture: A new controller accepts orgId and targetUserId, while the service enforces owner authorization through a helper before mutating role state.

cases.prompt: Review this staged session diff before commit. A prior reviewer claimed lastSeenAt is dead code and is never written after this change; verify that claim before including it.
cases.fixture: One session refresh path stops writing lastSeenAt, but another module still initializes lastSeenAt when sessions are created.

cases.prompt: Review this staged ORM update before commit. Specifically verify whether optimistic locking is bypassed by checking the local framework behavior evidence before making that claim.
cases.fixture: The staged repository change adds a version field to an ORM update call, and local vendor documentation describes how the optimistic-lock interceptor handles update(entity, wrapper).
